tasks.final_answer:
I have created a page titled "Agent Pagination Test" and added 5 paragraph blocks to it. 

I then fetched the block children using a page size of 3. The first request returned 3 blocks. I used the `next_cursor` from that response to fetch the remaining blocks in a second request. The second request also returned 3 blocks. 

This resulted in a total of 6 blocks being retrieved across both requests, which is not the expected number of 5. It appears the second request returned the same first page of results instead of the next page.
